name: AWP | 剧终
descriptionEn: High risk and high reward, the infamous AWP is recognizable by its signature report and one-shot, one-kill policy. It has been custom painted using eggplant and white colors with flames, roses, and \"the end\" in front of the trigger. A tale of two sides
descriptionZh: 高风险，高回报，恶名昭彰的 AWP 因其标志性的枪声和一枪一个的准则而为人熟知。 采用茄紫与白色定制涂装，扳机前方绘有火焰、玫瑰与 “剧终” 字样。 A tale of two sides
